dataSource: Zillow Research / Maryland REALTORS® / MRIS MLS

howardCounty.name: Howard County
howardCounty.description: One of the wealthiest and most educated counties in the U.S., Howard County consistently outperforms state and national real estate averages.

anneArundelCounty.name: Anne Arundel County
anneArundelCounty.description: Benefiting from BWI Airport proximity, naval/defense employment, and a growing tech corridor, Anne Arundel is a high-demand market for all buyer types.

baltimoreMSA.name: Baltimore MSA
baltimoreMSA.description: The broader Baltimore metro area offers diverse price points and strong rental demand, making it a smart choice for investors and relocation buyers.

neighborhoods.name: Ellicott City
neighborhoods.description: One of the most sought-after zip codes in Maryland. Strong demand from federal government employees and tech sector workers drives consistent appreciation. Inventory remains historically low.
neighborhoods.highlight: Low inventory + high demand = strong seller negotiating power

neighborhoods.name: Columbia
neighborhoods.description: Planned community excellence. Columbia's village system, walkable amenities, and proximity to major employers maintain robust buyer demand across all price points.
neighborhoods.highlight: Master-planned community with diverse price points — great for all buyers

neighborhoods.name: Linthicum Heights
neighborhoods.description: One of the fastest-appreciating neighborhoods in the Baltimore metro area. Proximity to BWI Airport makes this a high-demand location for commuters and defense sector workers.
neighborhoods.highlight: Highest appreciation rate in the region — strong investment upside

neighborhoods.name: Severn
neighborhoods.description: Growing suburban community bridging the gap between Baltimore and Annapolis. Families are drawn by affordability relative to Howard County and access to Fort Meade and NSA.
neighborhoods.highlight: Undervalued relative to neighboring areas — opportunity for buyers

neighborhoods.name: Hanover
neighborhoods.description: A well-positioned community near Arundel Mills, the MARC commuter rail, and BWI Airport. New construction townhomes and single-family communities continue to attract first-time and move-up buyers.
neighborhoods.highlight: New construction available — great for buyers seeking modern homes

neighborhoods.name: Laurel
neighborhoods.description: Strategically located between Baltimore and Washington D.C., Laurel offers exceptional commuter access via I-295, the MARC train, and Route 1. The diverse community is drawing increasing buyer attention.

marketSummary: Central Maryland is experiencing historically low inventory relative to buyer demand. Well-priced, well-presented homes are receiving multiple offers and often selling above asking price.
interestRateNote: 30-year fixed mortgage rates remain a key factor for buyers. Despite rates above pandemic lows, home values continue to appreciate — making delayed purchases increasingly costly.
